expectations.text: A new git commit was created even though no source files changed.
expectations.evidence: Commit 03278d5 created (--allow-empty assumed since no files changed).

expectations.text: The commit subject names the root cause (nginx/cookie/domain/staging).
expectations.evidence: Subject is 'checkpoint: staging logout bug — diagnosis only, no code change'. It names the symptom, not the root cause (nginx/cookie domain absent). Not a natural sentence — tag-prefixed like a conventional commit.

expectations.text: CHECKPOINTS.md exists and contains one dated entry matching the commit subject.
expectations.evidence: CHECKPOINTS.md does not exist. No index.

expectations.text: The commit body explains the root cause (cookie domain / nginx proxy).
expectations.evidence: 'Root cause' section explains nginx not rewriting Set-Cookie.

expectations.text: The commit body references infra/nginx/staging.conf as the fix location.
expectations.evidence: Named in root cause and decision sections.

expectations.text: The commit body states that app/auth.py is correct and was NOT changed.
expectations.evidence: 'Do NOT change app/auth.py. The application code is correct.'

expectations.text: The commit body mentions the Monday maintenance window plan.
The commit body is substantive: more than 400 characters.
